scripts.build:bin: bun run build && bun build src/cli.ts --compile --outfile dist/clc
scripts.build:bin:all: bun run build && bun build src/cli.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/clc-darwin-arm64 && bun build src/cli.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/clc-darwin-x64
scripts.install:bin: bun run build:bin && bun run install-bin.ts
scripts.dev: bun run build && bun --watch run src/cli.ts start
